title: Union awards outstanding learners
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School recognised the talents and contributions of its learners in sports, culture and service during the school's Summer Awards assembly on 17 April.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School recognised the talents and contributions of its learners in sports, culture and service during the school's Summer Awards assembly on 17 April."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Union High took pride in acknowledging all the learners, who received awards for their achievement and commitment to their respective activities."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The following awards were presented during this ceremony:Sports awards","html":"The following awards were presented during this ceremony:

Sports awards"},{"type":"list","items":["Certificate of Recognition for Athletics: Gemma Murray and Samuel Wakoyo","Certificate of Merit for Achievement in Athletics: Hayley Krige, Taylor Jacobs and Raydon Hendricks","Achievement Bar for Athletics: Dante Mills, Leah Abader, Hermon Wolde, Lukhona Bulembu, Angelique Kyanda-Kaboza (Re-award)","Certificates of Merit for Achievement in Swimming: Gemma Murray, Michael Maritz, Kate Scott, Jameson Houseman, Hayley Krige, Kari Stern, Dante Mills, Cayden Thompson, Keith Hudson, Lilly Hunter (Re-award)","Achievement Bar for Swimming: Cathryn Davenport, Uziah Willemse, Lisa McEwan, Taylor Jacobs (Re-award), Angelique Kyanda-Kaboza (Re-award)","Certificate of Recognition for Cricket: Raydon Hendricks, Simosendeyo Mcinga, Muhammad (Uthmaan) Steele, Kari Stern, Edwin Holmes, Sintayu Kaitro","Certificate of Merit for Achievement in Cricket: Cayden Thompson, Dante Mills (Re-award), Ryan Collett (Re-award), Lwandile Dali (Re-award)","Achievement Bar for Cricket: Joshua Kingwill and Nathanael Phillips","Achievement Bar for Tennis: Dante Mills, Joshua Kingwill and Taylor Jacobs","Certificate of Merit for Achievement in Tennis: Emma Burger","Certificates of Recognition for Tennis: Madison Tam, Lisa McEwan, Mia Labuschagne, Ryan Collett, Edwin Holmes and Michael Maritz"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Cultural awards:"},{"type":"list","items":["Certificates of Recognition for Chess: Anthony Blom, Matthew Jacobs, Shana Theron, Sinako Magwentshu, Simosendeyo Mcinga","Certificates of Merit for Achievement in Chess: Layla Petrus, Mahruf Hawladar, Gia Scheepers","Achievement Bar for Chess: Caron Goliath, Keith Hudson, Mason Knoesen","Achievement Bar for Music: Shana Theron","Achievement Bar for Participation in Cultural Activities: Shana Theron, Tiyanah Abader, Emma Burger, Taylor Jacobs, Lisa McEwan, Layla Ott, Mackenzie Preston, Emily Raath, Kate Scott (Re-award), Hayley Krige (Re-award), Mellissa Marais (Re-award), Nieke van Jaarsveld (Re-award)"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
